audioIngestion.label: Audio Ingestion
audioIngestion.description: Upload and ingest forensic audio files

validation.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported audio format. Supported formats: WAV, MP3, FLAC, AIFF
validation.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum file size is 2GB

errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload file. Please try again.

audioIngestion.title: Ingest Audio Evidence
audioIngestion.description: Securely upload and catalog forensic audio files for authentication and enhancement.
audioIngestion.dragDrop: Drag and drop audio files here
audioIngestion.supportedFormats: Securely upload WAV, MP3, FLAC, or AIFF formats. Files are encrypted during transit and at rest.
audioIngestion.highNoiseText: Detects padding sequences and null patterns that reveal synthetic processing. Identifies micro-structural repetitions characteristic of AI voice engines.
audioIngestion.batchText: Inspects inconsistencies in internal records and container architecture indicating manipulation, re-encoding, or third-party software use.

metadata.title: Metadata module
metadata.description: Here you can centralise forms, results and tools related to audio metadata analysis.
